title: pelargonium leeanum
intro: Pelargonium leeanum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant pink flowers and leaves with a distinctive rose-like scent. Traditionally, Rose Geranium has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mood, and supporting immune function, as well as alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Rose Geranium can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
